items.headline: 1 trade chip for every team ahead of 2026 Deadline

news_items.headline: Jays' Scherzer reaches 3,500 career strikeouts
news_items.summary: Blue Jays pitcher Max Scherzer reached 3,500 strikeouts when he caught Phillies slugger Kyle Schwarber looking at an 86 mph changeup to begin the game Wednesday night.

news_items.headline: Braves' Acuña again to IL with hamstring strain
news_items.summary: Braves outfielder Ronald Acuña Jr. has been placed on the 10-day injured list after he again suffered a strained left hamstring.

news_items.headline: Royals' Lugo hit in head by 106.6 mph line drive
news_items.summary: Seth Lugo was hit in the head by a 106.6 mph line drive from Brandon Nimmo and left Wednesday night's game.

news_items.headline: Skubal rejoins Tigers' rotation Sat. vs. Guardians...
news_items.summary: Tarik Skubal will start Saturday's game against the Guardians, as the ace left-hander rejoins the Tigers less than six weeks after elbow surgery.

news_items.headline: Chapman: If Yanks want me, GM should apologize
news_items.summary: If the Yankees were to acquire Red Sox closer Aroldis Chapman, he would like New York GM Brian Cashman to apologize to him for how his previous stint with the team ended.

news_items.headline: Ohtani rues non-challenge as LA blows 5-run lead
news_items.summary: Shohei Ohtani cruised through the first six innings Wednesday before things unraveled in the seventh, including a missed ABS challenge that helped the Pirates rally and set the stage for a 9-8 win over the Dodgers.

news_items.headline: Pirates' Cruz lands on IL with broken left hand
news_items.summary: Pirates outfielder Oneil Cruz went on the 10-day injured list Wednesday after tests revealed non-displaced fractures between his ring finger and his pinkie.

news_items.headline: MLB Power Rankings: Two unlikely playoff contender...
news_items.summary: While the same five teams remain in our top five for the fourth week in a row, a number of clubs are rising -- and falling -- throughout the rest of our list.

news_items.headline: Who’s Hot, Who’s Cold: Blue Jays Pitchers
news_items.summary: Over the past four weeks, the Jays are 14-12 with a 3.97 ERA Hot Kevin Gausman: 5 starts, 2-1, 3.14ERA. In 28.2 innings, batters hit .243/.278/.411 with 3 home runs, 5 walks and 31 strikeouts. Two quality starts, one good start that went five innings and a couple of less great starts. At 35 he’s […]

news_items.headline: Series Preview: Milwaukee Brewers vs. Philadelphia Phillies
news_items.summary: Brewers return home to host Phillies

news_items.headline: The Yankees have a problem behind the plate
news_items.summary: With Austin Wells’ injury and struggles this year, the Yankees need more talent at the crucial catcher position.

news_items.headline: A favorable matchup for Dodgers’ left-handed hitters
news_items.summary: Offensive production hasn’t been a problem for the Dodgers against the Pirates, particularly from their lefty hitters
